results.name: English

results.question: In "Glimpses of India", which statement is most accurate about theme interpretation?

results.correct_answer: Tone And Mood works only when chapter-specific constraints and definitions are satisfied.

Plot Development is enough even when data contradict the claim.

incorrect_answers: Both are true, but the Reason does not explain the Assertion.

Assertion is false, but Reason is true.
